headline: Open Distance Learning Enrollment Hits 280,000 With Quality Questions
context: ODL programs at public and private universities enrolled 280,000 students in 2025 but completion rates remain low.

cards.big: 280,000 students enrolled in distance learning programs across 45 institutions in 2025
cards.sub: Only 42% of ODL students complete their programs within stipulated time

cards.big: MQA found 18 ODL programs with student-faculty ratios exceeding 200 to 1
cards.sub: Mass enrollment without proportional academic support undermines quality

cards.big: ODL degree holders earn 18% less than on-campus graduates from the same universities
cards.sub: Employer perception of ODL quality creates persistent wage disadvantage

cards.big: UK Open University maintains 72% completion rate through structured tutorial support
cards.sub: Investment in learner support services is the key differentiator for ODL quality

cards.big: Expanding access through ODL is meaningless if most students never finish their programs
Should MQA set maximum student-faculty ratios for distance learning programs
